examples: The size of the nebula at this stage is inversely proportional to its mass.
The amount of force needed is inversely proportional to the rigidity of the material.
We regard health as inversely related to social class.
Inversely, almost 90% of the men I interview immediately ask for more upon getting the offer.
The 10-year yield, which moves inversely to prices, dropped to a decade-low earlier in the week.
